description_long: This object is a lifelike model of a small parakeet, featuring a streamlined body with a slightly rounded head and a short, conical beak. The plumage is predominantly white and pale yellow on the head and upper back, transitioning to light gray and brownish tones along the wings and tail. The bird's back displays a speckled pattern of yellow and brown, while the wings are more muted with subtle shading. The tail is long and tapers to a point, with a soft gradient from pale to darker hues. The legs are not clearly visible, but the overall form is slender and delicate, typical of a budgerigar. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, mimicking the natural sheen of feathers.
description: A small, slender parakeet with yellow, white, and gray plumage, speckled on the back and a long, pointed tail. The model is detailed and lifelike, with a smooth, slightly glossy finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's streamlined body, yellow-speckled back, and long, pointed tail.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the symmetrical feather pattern on the back and the full length of the tail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with visible gradient from yellow to gray along the body and tail.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the rounded head, short beak, and the central yellow and white plumage.
attribute_plumage_pattern: Speckled yellow and brown on the back, with solid white and yellow on the head and upper body, and a gradient to gray and brown on the wings and tail.
